title: vSkill Studio — Unified Agent + Model Picker (Claude-Default, Two-Pane, Searchable)
description: Replace the current flat Model Selector with a unified two-pane Agent + Model Picker. Agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Zed, Anthropic API, OpenRouter, Ollama, LM Studio) are the top-level choice; models filter by agent. Claude Code is the DEFAULT whenever `.claude/` is present and the `claude` binary is installable. OpenRouter's 300+ model catalog becomes searchable by name, context window, and price. API key management moves into a single settings surface reachable from the picker footer. Locked providers show inline 'Add API key' CTAs (never greyed-out rows). The picker is keyboard-driven (↑↓ Enter Esc Cmd+K) and delivers Linear/Raycast-level feel. Reframes 'Claude (Max/Pro subscription)' as 'Use current Claude Code session' to comply with Anthropic's April 4 2026 ToS ban on third-party OAuth. Normalises `OLLAMA_HOST` as primary env var with `OLLAMA_BASE_URL` backcompat. Documents all env vars in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md §5.

scope.outOfScope: vskill-platform marketing site, new provider SDKs beyond those listed, cloud secret sync, OAuth flows of any kind
scope.primaryAudience: developers using the local vskill studio SPA

coreRequirements: Two-pane picker: agents left, filtered models right
Claude Code is the default agent when .claude/ exists AND claude binary is on PATH
OpenRouter catalog is searchable (name / price / context window) with 10-min server cache
API key settings modal is a single surface reachable from picker footer
Locked providers show inline 'Add API key' / 'Install <tool>' CTAs — never greyed-out disabled rows
StatusBar carries a lock/unlock glyph per provider
'Claude (Max/Pro subscription)' renamed to 'Use current Claude Code session'; adapter never reads ~/.claude/credentials*
OLLAMA_HOST primary, OLLAMA_BASE_URL fallback; documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md §5
Keyboard-driven: ↑↓ navigate, Enter select, Esc close, Cmd+K toggle open
Frontend-design ground rules: Inter Tight, tabular-nums pricing, 36px agent rows, 44px model rows, 120ms fade + 2px translate-up motion, 1px left accent border on active row

complianceRisk.ruling: Only official Claude Code / claude.ai / Claude Desktop clients may consume Max/Pro subscription quota via OAuth. Third-party apps scraping ~/.claude/credentials.json or embedding OAuth are banned.
complianceRisk.vskillImpact: Current UI label 'Claude (Max/Pro subscription)' implies direct subscription consumption. Must reframe and verify adapter never reads ~/.claude/credentials* family.
complianceRisk.mitigationPath: Delegate via `claude` CLI spawn — same consumer Claude Code uses — which is sanctioned. Bundle grep + unit test enforce absence of credential-file reads.
